title: coryphantha neomexicana
intro: Coryphantha neomexicana, also known as the New Mexico pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Coryphantha, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds and infections. The health benefits of Coryphantha neomexicana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Coryphantha neomexicana can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
